title: Make It Real PRD Artifact
description: Schema for the Make It Real product requirements artifact stored as prd.json.

schemaVersion.description: Artifact schema version emitted by the Make It Real planner.

id.description: Stable PRD identifier referenced by work items and Blueprint review evidence.

title.description: Human-readable title for the planned product slice.

goals.description: Outcome statements the implementation must satisfy.

userVisibleBehavior.description: User-observable behavior promised by the PRD.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Traceable acceptance criteria used by work items and gates.

id.description: Stable acceptance criterion identifier used in prdTrace.

statement.description: The concrete behavior or evidence requirement for this criterion.

nonGoals.description: Explicitly excluded outcomes that should not be inferred during implementation.

request.description: Original planning request text when the PRD was generated from a user prompt.
